name: Armor-Piercing Rounds
effect: Deal an additional 20% damage (+20% per stack) to bosses.
quote: Deal extra damage to bosses.

name: Backup Magazine
effect: Add +1 (+1 per stack) charge of your Secondary skill.
quote: Add an extra charge of your Secondary skill.

name: Bison Steak
effect: Increases maximum health by 25 (+25 per stack).
quote: Gain 25 max health.

name: Bolstering Lantern
effect: Increase your attack speed by 10% (+3.5% per stack) for up to 3 (+1 per stack) enemies and allies within 20 meters.
quote: Increases your attack speed for every nearby enemy and ally.

name: Bundle of Fireworks
effect: Activating an interactable launches 8 (+4 per stack) fireworks that deal 300% base damage.
quote: Activating an interactable launches fireworks at nearby enemies.

name: Bustling Fungus
effect: After standing still for 1 second, create a zone that heals for 4.5% (+2.25% per stack) of your health every second to all allies within 3m (+1.5m per stack).
quote: Heal all nearby allies after standing still for 1 second.

name: Cautious Slug
effect: Increases base health regeneration by +3 hp/s (+3 hp/s per stack) while outside of combat.
quote: Rapidly heal outside of danger.

name: Chronic Expansion
effect: Killing an enemy increases your damage by 3.5% (+1% per stack), up to 10 (+5 per stack), for 7s. Dealing damage refreshes the timer.
quote: Deal bonus damage for each enemy killed.

name: Crowbar
effect: Deal +75% (+75% per stack) damage to enemies above 90% health.
quote: Deal bonus damage to enemies above 90% health.

name: Delicate Watch
effect: Increase damage by 20% (+20% per stack). Taking damage to below 25% health breaks this item.
quote: Deal bonus damage. Breaks at low health.

name: Eclipse Lite
effect: When a skill comes off cooldown, gain a temporary barrier for 1% (+0.25% per stack) of your maximum health per second of the skill's base cooldown.
quote: Gain a small temporary barrier when a skill comes off cooldown.

name: Elusive Antlers
effect: Spawns orbs of energy nearby every 10s (-10% per stack), giving +12% movement speed up to 3 (+3 per stack) times for 12s.
quote: Spawns orbs of energy that give bonus movement speed.

name: Energy Drink
effect: Sprint speed is improved by 25% (+25% per stack).
quote: Increase sprint speed by +25%.

name: Focus Crystal
effect: Increase damage to enemies within 13m by 20% (+20% per stack).
quote: Deal bonus damage to nearby enemies.

name: Gasoline
effect: Killing an enemy ignites all enemies within 12m (+4m per stack) for 150% base damage. Additionally, enemies burn for 150% (+75% per stack) base damage.
quote: Killing an enemy ignites other nearby enemies.

name: Hiker's Boots
effect: Striking enemies from a higher elevation grants +1% (+1% per stack) critical strike chance and critical strike damage, up to 10 times. Lasts 10 seconds.
quote: Striking enemies from a higher elevation grants critical strike chance and damage.

name: Item Scrap, White
effect: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.
quote: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.

name: Lens-Maker's Glasses
effect: Your attacks have a 10% (+10% per stack) chance to 'Critically Strike', dealing double damage.
quote: Gain 10% chance for hits to 'Critically Strike', dealing double damage.

name: Medkit
effect: 2 seconds after getting hurt, heal for 20 plus an additional 5% (+5% per stack) of maximum health.
quote: Receive a delayed heal after taking damage.

name: Mocha
effect: Increases attack speed by 7.5% (+7.5% per stack) and movement speed by 7% (+7% per stack).
quote: Slightly increase attack speed and movement speed.

name: Monster Tooth
effect: Killing an enemy spawns a healing orb that heals for 8 plus an additional 2% (+2% per stack) of maximum health.
quote: Drop a healing orb on kill.

name: Oddly-shaped Opal
effect: Increase armor by 100 (+100 per stack) while out of danger.
quote: Reduce damage the first time you are hit.

name: Paul's Goat Hoof
effect: Increases movement speed by 14% (+14% per stack).
quote: Increase movement speed.

name: Personal Shield Generator
effect: Gain a shield equal to 8% (+8% per stack) of your maximum health. Recharges outside of danger.
quote: Gain a recharging shield.

name: Power Elixir
effect: Taking damage to below 25% health consumes this item, healing you for 75% of maximum health.
quote: Receive an instant heal at low health. Consumed on use.

name: Repulsion Armor Plate
effect: Reduce all incoming damage by {{Color|d|5{{Stack| (+5 per stack)}}}}. Cannot be reduced below 1.
quote: Receive flat damage reduction from all attacks.

name: Roll of Pennies
effect: Gain 3 (+3 per stack) gold on taking damage from an enemy. Scales over time.
quote: Gain gold on taking damage.

name: Rusted Key
effect: A hidden cache containing an item (80%/20%) will appear in a random location on each stage. Opening the cache consumes this item.
quote: Gain access to a Rusty Lockbox that contains a powerful item.

name: Soldier's Syringe
effect: Increases attack speed by 15% (+15% per stack).
quote: Increase attack speed.

name: Sticky Bomb
effect: 5% (+5% per stack) chance on hit to attach a bomb to an enemy, detonating for 180% TOTAL damage.
quote: Chance on hit to attach a bomb to enemies.

name: Stun Grenade
effect: 5% (+5% on stack) chance on hit to stun enemies for 2 seconds.
quote: Chance to stun on hit.

name: Topaz Brooch
effect: Gain a temporary barrier on kill for 15 health (+15 per stack).
quote: Gain a temporary barrier on kill.

name: Tougher Times
effect: 15% (+15% per stack) chance to block incoming damage. Unaffected by luck.
quote: Chance to block incoming damage.

name: Tri-Tip Dagger
effect: 10% (+10% per stack) chance to bleed an enemy for 240% base damage.
quote: Gain +10% chance to bleed enemies on hit.

name: Warbanner
effect: On level up or starting the Teleporter event, drop a banner that strengthens all allies within 16m (+8m per stack). Raise attack and movement speed by 30%.
quote: Drop a Warbanner on level up or starting the Teleporter event. Grants allies attack and movement speed.

name: Warped Echo
effect: The next source of damage is reduced by 10% and spread into 3 (+1 per stack) hits. All echoed damage is non-lethal except for the final hit. Recharges every 15s.
quote: Incoming damage is reduced and dealt over time.

name: AtG Missile Mk. 1
effect: 10% chance to fire a missile that deals 300% (+300% per stack) TOTAL damage.
quote: Chance to fire a missile.

name: Bandolier
effect: 18% (+10% per stack) chance on kill to drop an ammo pack that resets all skill cooldowns.
quote: Chance on kill to drop an ammo pack that resets all skill cooldowns.

name: Berzerker's Pauldron
effect: Killing 4 enemies within 1 second sends you into a frenzy for 6s (+4s per stack). Increases movement speed by 50% and attack speed by 100%.
quote: Enter a frenzy after killing 4 enemies in quick succession.

name: Box of Dynamite
effect: Gain Lt. Droneboy. While in combat, your drones drop sticks of dynamite that detonate for 240% damage (+85% per stack), stunning enemies. Recharges after 10 seconds.
quote: Your drones periodically drop dynamite.

name: Breaching Fin
effect: Grounded enemies hit with any skill are launched and stunned. Enemies hit while airborne are launched again up to 2 times (+1 per stack). Launched enemies take increased damage by 10% from all sources per launch.
quote: Grounded enemies hit by any skill are launched and take bonus damage.

name: Chance Doll
effect: 40% (+10% per stack) chance to get higher rarity items from chance shrines on success.
quote: Chance to increase item rarity at Shrines of Chance.

name: Chronobauble
effect: Slow enemies on hit for -60% movement speed for 2s (+2s per stack).
quote: Slow enemies on hit.

name: Collector's Compulsion
effect: Picking up an item or other collectible increases all stats by +3% for 20 seconds, up to 3 (+2 per stack) times. Barrels grant minor pickups.
quote: Pickups grant a stacking bonus to all stats. Open a barrel to find a minor pick-up.

name: Death Mark
effect: Enemies with 4 or more debuffs are marked for death, increasing damage taken by 50% from all sources for 7 (+7 per stack) seconds.
quote: Enemies with 4 or more debuffs are marked for death, taking bonus damage.

name: Faraday Spur
effect: Moving around builds up charge, granting up to +160% movement speed and +200% jump height at 100%. At 25% charge or higher, jumping triggers an explosive discharge for 400% (+280% per stack) damage in a 5m to 32.3m (+7.5m per stack) area.
quote: Moving around builds up movement speed and jump height. At 25% charge or higher, jump to discharge into an electric blast.

name: Fuel Cell
effect: Hold an additional equipment charge (+1 per stack). Reduce equipment cooldown by 15% (+15% per stack).
quote: Hold an additional equipment charge. Reduce equipment cooldown.

name: Ghor's Tome
effect: 4% (+4% on stack) chance on kill to drop a treasure worth $25. Scales over time.
quote: Chance on kill to drop a treasure.

name: Harvester's Scythe
effect: Gain 5% critical chance. Critical strikes heal for 8 (+4 per stack) health.
quote: 'Critical Strikes' heal you.

name: Hopoo Feather
effect: Gain +1 (+1 per stack) maximum jump count.
quote: Gain an extra jump.

name: Hunter's Harpoon
effect: Killing an enemy increases movement speed by 125%, fading over 1 (+0.5 per stack) seconds.
quote: Killing an enemy gives you a burst of movement speed.

name: Ignition Tank
effect: Ignite effects deal +300% (+300% per stack) more damage over time.
quote: Your ignite effects deal quadruple damage.

name: Infusion
effect: Killing an enemy increases your health permanently by 1 (+1 per stack), up to a maximum of 100 (+100 per stack) health.
quote: Killing an enemy permanently increases your maximum health, up to 100.

name: Item Scrap, Green
effect: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.
quote: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.

name: Kinetic Dampener
effect: Increases armor by 30 (+30 per stack) while you have a shield. When shield breaks, release a stunning pulse for 100% damage plus an amount equal to 100% (+10% per stack) of your max shield. Grants a shield for 4% of your max health.
quote: Gain bonus armor while you have a shield. When shield breaks, release a stunning pulse that deals more damage the more shield you have.

name: Kjaro's Band
effect: Hits that deal more than 400% damage also blasts enemies with a runic flame tornado, dealing 300% (+300% per stack) TOTAL damage over time. Recharges every 10 seconds.
quote: High damage hits also blasts enemies with a runic flame tornado. Recharges over time.

name: Leeching Seed
effect: Dealing damage heals you for 1 (+1 per stack) health.
quote: Dealing damage heals you.

name: Lepton Daisy
effect: Release a healing nova during the Teleporter event, healing all nearby allies for 50% of their maximum health. Occurs 1 (+1 per stack) times.
quote: Periodically release a healing nova during the Teleporter event and 'Holdout Zones' such as the Void Fields.

name: Luminous Shot
effect: Activating Secondary skill stores up to 5 charges (+1 per stack). Requires 3 charges for your Primary skill to fire lightning strikes, dealing 175% TOTAL damage (+50% per stack) each. Reduces Secondary skill cooldown by 20%.
quote: Activating your Secondary skill charges your Primary skill with powerful lightning strikes. Requires 3 charges.

name: Noxious Thorn
effect: Gain 10% chance to bleed an enemy. On killing an enemy, transfer 33% of every debuff stack to 1 enemy (+1 per stack) within 20m (+5m per stack).
quote: Killing an enemy transfers debuffs to a nearby enemy.

name: Old Guillotine
effect: Instantly kill Elite monsters below 13% (+13% per stack) health.
quote: Instantly kill low health Elite monsters.

name: Old War Stealthkit
effect: Falling below 25% health causes you to gain 40% movement speed and invisibility for 5s. Recharges every 30 seconds (-50% per stack).
quote: Turn invisible at low health.

name: Prayer Beads
effect: Grows by gaining experience, storing 20% (+5% per stack) bonus stats (health, regeneration, and damage). On removal, gain all stored stats.
quote: Gains experience alongside you. Upon removal, grants bonus stats.

name: Predatory Instincts
effect: Gain 5% critical chance. Critical strikes increase attack speed by 12%. Maximum cap of 36% (+24% per stack) attack speed.
quote: 'Critical Strikes' increase attack speed. Stacks 3 times.

name: Razorwire
effect: Getting hit causes you to explode in a burst of razors, dealing 160% damage. Hits up to 5 (+2 per stack) targets in a 25m (+10m per stack) radius
quote: Retaliate in a burst of razors on taking damage.

name: Red Whip
effect: Leaving combat boosts your movement speed by 30% (+30% per stack).
quote: Move fast out of combat.

name: Regenerating Scrap
effect: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with Uncommon 3D Printers. At the start of each stage, it regenerates.
quote: Prioritized when used with Uncommon 3D Printers. Usable once per stage.

name: Rose Buckler
effect: Increase armor by 30 (+30 per stack) while sprinting.
quote: Reduce incoming damage while sprinting.

name: Runald's Band
effect: Hits that deal more than 400% damage also blasts enemies with a runic ice blast, slowing them by 80% for 3s (+3s per stack) and dealing 250% (+250% per stack) TOTAL damage. Recharges every 10 seconds.
quote: High damage hits also blasts enemies with runic ice. Recharges over time.

name: Sale Star
effect: Gain an extra item on the first chest opened per stage. {{Stack|Each additional Sale Star increases the chance of getting more items by 5%}}.
quote: First chest bought yields more than one reward. Usable once per stage.

name: Shipping Request Form
effect: A delivery containing 2 items (79%/20%/1%) will appear in a random location on each stage. {{Stack|(Increases rarity chances of the items per stack).}}
quote: Get a delivery each stage that contains powerful items.

name: Shuriken
effect: Activating your Primary skill also throws a shuriken that deals 400% (+100% per stack) base damage. You can hold up to 3 (+1 per stack) shurikens which all reload over 10 seconds.
quote: Activating your Primary skill also throws a shuriken. Recharges over time.

name: Squid Polyp
effect: Activating an interactable summons a Squid Turret that attacks nearby enemies at 100% (+100% per stack) attack speed. Lasts 30 seconds.
quote: Activating an interactable summons a Squid Turret nearby.

name: Ukulele
effect: 25% chance to fire chain lightning for 80% TOTAL damage on up to 3 (+2 per stack) targets within 20m (+2m per stack).
quote: ...and his music was electric.

name: Unstable Transmitter
effect: Falling below 25% health gives you 60% of your maximum health as a temporary barrier. Gain a dimensional aura for 8s that bleeds and teleports away enemies. Enemies killed by the aura extend the duration by 1s. At the start of each stage, it regenerates.
quote: Gain a temporary barrier and a dimensional aura on low health.

name: War Horn
effect: Activating your Equipment gives you +70% attack speed for 8s (+4s per stack).
quote: Activating your Equipment gives you a burst of attack speed.

name: Wax Quail
effect: Jumping while sprinting boosts you forward by 10m (+10m per stack).
quote: Jumping while sprinting boosts you forward.

name: Will-o'-the-wisp
effect: On killing an enemy, spawn a lava pillar in a 12m (+2.4m per stack) radius for 350% (+280% per stack) base damage.
quote: Detonate enemies on kill.

name: 57 Leaf Clover
effect: All random effects are rolled +1 (+1 per stack) times for a favorable outcome.
quote: Luck is on your side.

name: Aegis
effect: Healing past full grants you a temporary barrier for 50% (+50% per stack) of the amount you healed.
quote: Healing past full grants you a temporary barrier.

name: Alien Head
effect: Reduce skill cooldowns by 25% (+25% per stack).
quote: Reduces cooldowns for your skills.

name: Ben's Raincoat
effect: Prevents 1 (+1 per stack) debuff and instead grants a temporary barrier for 10% of maximum health. Recharges every 5 seconds.
quote: Prevent debuffs, instead gaining a temporary barrier. Recharges over time.

name: Bottled Chaos
effect: Trigger a random equipment effect 1 (+1 per stack) time(s).
quote: Activating your Equipment triggers an additional, random Equipment effect.

name: Brainstalks
effect: Upon killing an elite monster, enter a frenzy for 4s (+4s per stack) where skills have 0.5s cooldowns.
quote: Skills have NO cooldowns for a short period after killing an elite.

name: Brilliant Behemoth
effect: All your attacks explode in a 4m (+2.5m per stack) radius for a bonus 60% TOTAL damage to nearby enemies.
quote: All your attacks explode!

name: Ceremonial Dagger
effect: Killing an enemy fires out 3 homing daggers that deal 150% (+150% per stack) base damage.
quote: Killing an enemy releases homing daggers.

name: Defensive Microbots
effect: Shoot down 1 (+1 per stack) projectiles within 20m every 0.5 seconds. Recharge rate scales with attack speed.
quote: Shoot down nearby projectiles. Recharge rate scales with attack speed.

name: Dio's Best Friend
effect: Upon death, this item will be consumed and you will return to life with 3 seconds of invulnerability.
quote: Cheat death. Consumed on use.

name: Electric Boomerang
effect: 15% chance on hit to fire an electric boomerang that travels a short distance before returning, dealing 120% (+120% per stack) damage and stunning all enemies hit. Also deals an additional 42% (+42% per stack) per second. Can strike enemies on the way back.
quote: On hit chance to throw a stunning boomerang.

name: Frost Relic
effect: Killing an enemy surrounds you with an ice storm that deals 1200% damage per second and slows enemies by 80% for 1.5s. The storm grows with every kill, increasing its radius by 2m. Stacks up to 18m (+12m per stack).
quote: Killing enemies surrounds you with an ice storm.

name: Growth Nectar
effect: Grants 4% increase to ALL stats for each buff, up to a maximum of 4 (+4 per stack).
quote: Your buffs grant an increase to ALL of your stats.

name: H3AD-5T v2
effect: Increase jump height. Creates a 5m-100m radius kinetic explosion on hitting the ground, dealing 1000%-10000% base damage that scales up with fall distance. Recharges in 10 (-50% per stack) seconds.
quote: Increase jump height. Hold 'Interact' to slam down to the ground.

name: Happiest Mask
effect: Killing enemies has a 7% chance to spawn a ghost of the killed enemy with 1500% damage. Lasts 30s (+30s per stack).
quote: Chance on killing an enemy to summon a ghost.

name: Hardlight Afterburner
effect: Add +2 (+2 per stack) charges of your Utility skill. Reduces Utility skill cooldown by 33%.
quote: Add 2 extra charges of your Utility skill. Reduce Utility skill cooldown.

name: Interstellar Desk Plant
effect: On kill, plant a healing fruit seed that grows into a plant after 5 seconds.\r\n\r\nThe plant heals for 5% of maximum health every 0.5 second to all allies within 10m (+5.0m per stack). Lasts 10 seconds.
quote: Plant a healing fruit on kill.

name: Item Scrap, Red
effect: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.
quote: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.

name: Laser Scope
effect: Critical Strikes deal an additional 100% damage (+100% per stack).
quote: Your 'Critical Strikes' deal an additional 100% damage.

name: N'kuhana's Opinion
effect: Store 100% (+100% per stack) of healing as Soul Energy. After your Soul Energy reaches 10% of your maximum health, fire a skull that deals 250% of your Soul Energy as damage.
quote: Fire haunting skulls when healed.

name: Networked Suffering
effect: Infect up to 4 (+2 per stack) enemies with a computer virus that duplicates 45% of all damage taken and sends it to a global damage pool. Every 3 seconds, ALL infected enemies suffer 100% pooled damage.
quote: Inflict a computer virus on hit that spreads a portion of all damage dealt between infected enemies. Affects up to 4 enemies.

name: Orphaned Core
effect: Gain a friendly Solus unit that launches itself at enemies for 400% (+400% per stack). The unit inherits your movement speed items and deals more damage the faster it moves. The unit can be pet to cleanse negative effects. Recharges after 15 seconds.
quote: Gain a buddy who launches itself at enemies to deal damage. Inherits your movement-related items.

name: Pocket I.C.B.M.
effect: All missile items and equipment fire an additional 2 missiles. Increase missile damage by 0% (+50% per stack).
quote: All Missile items deal more damage and fire an additional two missiles.

name: Rejuvenation Rack
effect: Heal +100% (+100% per stack) more.
quote: Double the strength of healing.

name: Resonance Disc
effect: Killing 4 enemies in 7 seconds charges the Resonance Disc. The disc launches itself toward a target for 300% base damage (+300% per stack), piercing all enemies it doesn't kill, and then explodes for 1000% base damage (+1000% per stack). Returns to the user, striking all enemies along the way for 300% base damage (+300% per stack).
quote: Obtain a Resonance Disc charged by killing enemies. Fires automatically when fully charged.

name: Runic Lens
effect: 3% chance on hit to call down a meteor, dealing 2000% base damage. Every 100% attack damage dealt increases the activation chance by 3% (+3% per stack) and damage by 150% (+50% per stack).
quote: Chance to call down a meteor. Damage and chance are increased with higher damage hits.

name: Sentient Meat Hook
effect: 20% (+20% per stack) chance on hit to fire homing hooks at up to 10 (+5 per stack) enemies for 100% TOTAL damage.
quote: Chance to hook all nearby enemies.

name: Shattering Justice
effect: After hitting an enemy 5 times, reduce their armor by 60 for 8 (+8 per stack) seconds.
quote: Reduce the armor of enemies after repeatedly striking them.

name: Sonorous Whispers
effect: When a large monster is killed it will always drop an item. All elites have a 5% chance of dropping an item (+1% per item stack).
quote: Upon large or elite monster kill chance to drop items.

name: Soulbound Catalyst
effect: Kills reduce equipment cooldown by 4s (+2s per stack).
quote: Kills reduce equipment cooldown.

name: Spare Drone Parts
effect: Gain Col. Droneman. Drones gain +25% (+25% per stack) attack speed and cooldown reduction. Drones gain 10% chance to fire a missile on hit, dealing 150% TOTAL damage. Drones gain an automatic chain gun that deals 6x50% damage, bouncing to 2 enemies.
quote: Your drones fire faster, have less cooldowns, shoot missiles, and gain a bonus chaingun.

name: Substandard Duplicator
effect: Picking up an item gives you a temporary copy of itself. Temporary items last an additional 10 (+10 per stack) seconds
quote: Picking up an item grants a temporary copy.

name: Symbiotic Scorpion
effect: 100% chance on hit to reduce armor by 2 (+2 per stack) permanently.
quote: Permanently reduce armor on hit.

name: Unstable Tesla Coil
effect: Fire out lightning that hits 3 (+2 per stack) enemies for 200% base damage every 0.5s. The Tesla Coil switches off every 10 seconds.
quote: Shock all nearby enemies every 10 seconds.

name: Wake of Vultures
effect: Gain the power of any killed elite monster for 8s (+5s per stack).
quote: Temporarily steal the power of slain elites.

name: War Bonds
effect: During boss events, 5 missiles bombard the area, dealing 2.5% (+2.5 per stack) of bosses' Max Health in damage. Before the boss event, gain additional missiles, up to a maximum of 20 (+5 per stack), per 50 gold gained. Gold requirement scales with time.
quote: Bombard boss events with missiles. The more gold earned, the more UES support is granted.

name: Artifact Key
effect: A stone shard with immense power.
quote: A stone shard with immense power.

name: Charged Perforator
effect: 10% chance on hit to down a lightning strike, dealing 500% (+500% per stack) damage.
quote: Chance on hit to call down a lightning strike.

name: Defense Nucleus
effect: Killing elite monsters spawns an Alpha Construct with bonus 300% damage and 300% health. Limited to 4 (+4 per stack).
quote: Summon an Alpha Construct on killing an elite.

name: Empathy Cores
effect: Every 30 seconds, summon two Solus Probes that gain +100% (+100% per stack) damage per ally on your team.
quote: Recruit a pair of Solus Probes that gain power with more allies.

name: Encrypted Cerebellum
effect: Contains encrypted remnants of the Collective network. Needs to be decrypted before it can be returned.
quote: Contains encrypted remnants of the Collective network. Needs to be decrypted.

name: Exposed Cerebellum
effect: A swarming data nexus representing the Collective network. Can be given to a powerful entity.
quote: A swarming data nexus representing the Collective network. Can be given to a powerful entity.

name: Faulty Conductor
effect: Every 15 (-20% per stack) seconds, release a wave of electricity that energizes nearby allies for 7 seconds. Energized allies gain +30% attack and movement speed, and ALWAYS land critical strikes with electric items and attacks.
quote: Occasionally release a pulse of electricity that energizes allies and makes enemies more susceptible to electric damage.

name: Functional Coupler
effect: Hold 1 additional equipment (+1 per stack). Press the interact and equipment buttons to cycle through held equipment.
quote: Holds an additional equipment.

name: Genesis Loop
effect: Falling below 25% health causes you to explode, dealing 6000% base damage. Recharges every {{Color|u|30 / (2 {{Stack|+1 per stack}}) seconds}}.
quote: Fire an electric nova at low health.

name: Halcyon Seed
effect: Summon Aurelionite during the teleporter event. It has 100% (+50% per stack) damage and 100% (+100% per stack) health.
quote: Summon Aurelionite during the Teleporter event.

name: Irradiant Pearl
effect: Increases ALL stats by 10% (+10% per stack).
quote: Increase ALL of your stats.

name: Item Scrap, Yellow
effect: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.
quote: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with 3D Printers.

name: Little Disciple
effect: Fire a tracking wisp for 300% (+300% per stack) damage. Fires every 1.6 seconds while sprinting. Fire rate increases with movement speed.
quote: Fire tracking wisps while sprinting.

name: Mired Urn
effect: While in combat, the nearest 1 (+1 per stack) enemies to you within 13m will be 'tethered' to you, dealing 100% damage per second, applying tar, and healing you for 100% of the damage dealt.
quote: Siphon health from nearby enemies while in combat.

name: Molten Perforator
effect: 10% chance on hit to call forth 3 magma balls from an enemy, dealing 300% (+300% per stack) damage each.
quote: Chance on hit to fire magma balls.

name: Pearl
effect: Increases maximum health by 10% (+10% per stack).
quote: Increase your maximum health.

name: Planula
effect: Heal from incoming damage for {{Color|h|15{{Stack| (+15 per stack)}}}}.
quote: Receive flat healing when attacked.

name: Prison Matrix
effect: Gain +50% armor. Can be placed in a Matrix Terminal.
quote: Gain +50% armor. Can be placed in a Matrix Terminal.

name: Queen's Gland
effect: Every 30 seconds, summon a Beetle Guard with bonus 300% damage and 100% health. Can have up to 1 (+1 per stack) Guards at a time.
quote: Recruit a Beetle Guard.

name: Sentry Key
effect: Gain +15% move speed. Can be placed in a Sentry Terminal or used for decryption.
quote: Gain +15% move speed. Can be placed in a Sentry Terminal.

name: Shatterspleen
effect: Gain 5% critical chance. Critical Strikes bleed enemies for 240% base damage. Bleeding enemies explode on death for 400% (+400% per stack) damage, plus an additional 15% (+15% per stack) of their maximum health.
quote: Critical strikes always bleed enemies. Bleeding enemies now explode.

name: Titanic Knurl
effect: Increase maximum health by 40 (+40 per stack) and base health regeneration by +1.6 hp/s (+1.6 hp/s per stack).
quote: Boosts health and regeneration.

name: Beads of Fealty
effect: Seems to do nothing... but...
quote: Seems to do nothing... but...

name: Brittle Crown
effect: 30% chance on hit to gain 2 (+2 per stack) gold. Scales over time.\r\n\r\nLose gold on taking damage equal to 100% (+100% per stack) of the maximum health percentage you lost.
quote: Gain gold on hit... BUT surrender gold on getting hit.

name: Corpsebloom
effect: Heal +100% (+100% per stack) more. All healing is applied over time. Can heal for a maximum of 10% (-50% per stack) of your health per second.
quote: Double your healing... BUT it's applied over time.

name: Defiant Gouge
effect: Using a Shrine summons enemies (stronger per stack) nearby. Scales over time.
quote: Using a Shrine summons enemies nearby.

name: Egocentrism
effect: Every 3 (-50% per stack) seconds, gain an orbiting bomb that detonates on impact for 360% damage, up to a maximum of 3 bombs (+1 per stack). Every 60 seconds, a random item is converted into this item.
quote: Gain multiple orbiting bombs. Every minute, assimilate another item into Egocentrism.

name: Essence of Heresy
effect: Replace your Special Skill with Ruin.\r\n\r\nDealing damage adds a stack of Ruin for 10 (+10 per stack) seconds. Activating the skill detonates all Ruin stacks at unlimited range, dealing 300% damage plus 120% damage per stack of Ruin. Recharges after 8 (+8 per stack) seconds.
quote: Replace your Special Skill with 'Ruin'.

name: Eulogy Zero
effect: Items have a 5% (+5% per stack) chance to become a Lunar item instead.
quote: Items and equipment have a small chance to transform into a Lunar item instead.

name: Focused Convergence
effect: Teleporters charge 30% (+30% per stack) faster, but the size of the Teleporter zone is 50% (-50% per stack) smaller.
quote: Increase the speed of Teleporter charging... BUT reduce the size of the zone.

name: Gesture of the Drowned
effect: Reduce Equipment cooldown by 50% (+15% per stack). Forces your Equipment to activate whenever it is off cooldown.
quote: Dramatically reduce Equipment cooldown... BUT it automatically activates.

name: Hooks of Heresy
effect: Replace your Secondary Skill with Slicing Maelstrom.\r\n\r\nCharge up a projectile that deals 875% damage per second to nearby enemies, exploding after 3 seconds to deal 700% damage and root enemies for 3 (+3 per stack) seconds. Recharges after 5 (+5 per stack) seconds.
quote: Replace your Secondary Skill with 'Slicing Maelstrom'.

name: Light Flux Pauldron
effect: Decrease skill cooldowns by 50% (+50% per stack). Decrease attack speed by 50% (+50% per stack).
quote: Halve your cooldowns.. BUT halve your attack speed.

name: Longstanding Solitude
effect: On level up gain a free unlock for the next purchase (+1 per stack) but all gold is converted to experience. Anything that costs gold is increased by 50% (+50% per stack).
quote: Free purchases on level up... BUT gold converts to experience.

name: Mercurial Rachis
effect: Creates a Ward of Power in a random location nearby that buffs both enemies and allies within 16m (+50% per stack), causing them to deal +50% damage.
quote: Randomly create a Ward of Power. ALL characters deal bonus damage while in the Ward.

name: Neutronium Weight
effect: Reduces your stats while in combat, but send this item to an enemy on hit. On death, this item will be sent to its holder's killer.\r\n\r\nReduces damage by 30% (+10% per stack), attack speed by 30% (+10% per stack), movement speed by 30% (+10% per stack), and armor by 35 (+15 per stack).
quote: Reduces all stats while in combat, but can be sent to an enemy on hit.

name: Purity
effect: All skill cooldowns are reduced by 2 (+1 per stack) seconds. All random effects are rolled +1 (+1 per stack) times for an unfavorable outcome.
quote: Reduce your skill cooldowns by 2 seconds. You are unlucky.

name: Shaped Glass
effect: Increase base damage by 100% (+100% per stack). Reduce maximum health by 50% (+50% per stack).
quote: Double your damage... BUT halve your health.

name: Stone Flux Pauldron
effect: Increase max health by 100% (+100% per stack). Reduce movement speed by 50% (+50% per stack).
quote: Double your health... BUT halve your speed.

name: Strides of Heresy
effect: Replace your Utility Skill with Shadowfade.\r\n\r\nFade away, becoming intangible and gaining +30% movement speed. Heal for 18.2% (+18.2% per stack) of your maximum health. Lasts 3 (+3 per stack) seconds.
quote: Replace your Utility Skill with 'Shadowfade'.

name: Transcendence
effect: Convert all but 1 health into regenerating shields. Gain 50% (+25% per stack) maximum health.
quote: Convert all your health into shield. Increase maximum health.

name: Visions of Heresy
effect: Replace your Primary Skill with Hungering Gaze.\r\n\r\nFire a flurry of tracking shards that detonate after a delay, dealing 120% base damage. Hold up to 12 charges (+12 per stack) that reload after 2 seconds (+2 per stack).
quote: Replace your Primary Skill with 'Hungering Gaze'.

name: Benthic Bloom
effect: Upgrades 3 (+3 per stack) random items to items of the next higher rarity at the start of each stage. Corrupts all 57 Leaf Clovers.
quote: Upgrades your items at the start of each stage. Corrupts all 57 Leaf Clovers.

name: Encrusted Key
effect: A hidden cache containing an item (60%/30%/10%) will appear in a random location on each stage. Opening the cache consumes this item. Corrupts all Rusted Keys.
quote: Gain access to an Encrusted Cache that contains a void item. Corrupts all Rusted Keys.

name: Lost Seer's Lenses
effect: Your attacks have a 0.5% (+0.5% per stack) chance to instantly kill a non-Boss enemy. Corrupts all Lens-Maker's Glasses.
quote: Gain a 0.5% chance to instantly kill a non-boss enemy. Corrupts all Lens-Maker's Glasses.

name: Lysate Cell
effect: Add +1 (+1 per stack) charge of your Special skill. Reduces Special skill cooldown by 33%. Corrupts all Fuel Cells.
quote: Add an extra charge of your Special skill. Corrupts all Fuel Cells.

name: Needletick
effect: 10% (+10% per stack) chance to collapse an enemy for 400% base damage. Corrupts all Tri-Tip Daggers.
quote: Chance to collapse enemies on hit. Corrupts all Tri-Tip Daggers.

name: Newly Hatched Zoea
effect: Every 60 (-50% per stack) seconds, gain a random Void ally. Can have up to 1 (+1 per stack) allies at a time. Corrupts all yellow items.
quote: Periodically recruit allies from the Void. Corrupts all yellow items.

name: Plasma Shrimp
effect: Gain a shield equal to 10% of your maximum health. While you have a shield, hitting an enemy fires a missile that deals 40% (+40% per stack) TOTAL damage. Corrupts all AtG Missile Mk. 1s.
quote: While you have shield, fire missiles on every hit. Corrupts all AtG Missile Mk. 1s.

name: Pluripotent Larva
effect: Upon death, this item will be consumed and you will return to life with 3 seconds of invulnerability, and all of your items that can be corrupted will be. Corrupts all Dio's Best Friends.
quote: Get a corrupted extra life. Consumed on use. Corrupts all Dio's Best Friends.

name: Polylute
effect: 25% chance to fire lightning for 60% TOTAL damage up to 3 (+3 per stack) times. Corrupts all Ukuleles.
quote: Chance to repeatedly strike a single enemy with lightning. Corrupts all Ukuleles.

name: Safer Spaces
effect: Blocks incoming damage once. Recharges after 13.5 seconds (-10% per stack) Corrupts all Tougher Times.
quote: Block the next source of damage. Corrupts all Tougher Times.

name: Singularity Band
effect: Hits that deal more than 400% damage also fire a black hole that draws enemies within 15m into its center. Lasts 5 seconds before collapsing, dealing 100% (+100% per stack) TOTAL damage. Recharges every 20 seconds. Corrupts all Runald's and Kjaro's Bands.
quote: High damage hits also create unstable black holes. Recharges over time. Corrupts all Runald's and Kjaro's Bands.

name: Tentabauble
effect: 5% (+5% per stack) chance on hit to root enemies for 1s (+1s per stack). Corrupts all Chronobaubles.
quote: Chance to root enemies on hit. Corrupts all Chronobaubles.

name: Voidsent Flame
effect: Upon hitting an enemy at full health, spawn a lava pillar in a 12m (+2.4m per stack) radius for 260% (+156% per stack) base damage. Corrupts all Will-o'-the-wisps.
quote: Full health enemies also detonate on hit. Corrupts all Will-o'-the-wisps.

name: Weeping Fungus
effect: Heals for 2% (+2% per stack) of your health every second while sprinting. Corrupts all Bustling Fungi.
quote: Heal while sprinting. Corrupts all Bustling Fungi.
